$comment: Filled by the ship-email skill from docs/SHIPPING-LOG.md + docs/brand.json, then re-themed for ONE audience. Copy to docs/announcements/<version>/content.json, edit, then run render-email.mjs. Strings are escaped at render time — write plain text, not HTML.
tagline: Run your jobs. Not your inbox.
subject: See exactly where your project's money is going
preheader: Your new Money & Progress page, change-order sign-off, and more.
headline: Your project, finally clear at a glance
intro: We just shipped a few things that make it easier to see where your remodel stands — no spreadsheet, no phone tag.

items.title: See where the money's going
items.body: Open one page to see how much of your budget is spent, what's left, and how far along the job is.

items.title: Approve changes with a real signature
items.body: When something changes, review it and sign right on the page. No printing, no email chase.

items.title: One shared punch list
items.body: The final to-do items live in one place everyone can see — so nothing slips at the finish line.

footer: You're receiving this because you have an active project on MyFieldTime.

social.post: Homeowners shouldn't need a spreadsheet to know where their remodel stands. MyFieldTime v0.8 puts budget, progress, and change-order sign-off on one page — so the client sees the money clearly and approves changes with a signature, not an email thread.
